prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is E-303 Terminations & splices within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.3 Wire & Cable. The observed field condition is: wrong wirenut size. The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 110.14.
title: T3 E-303 Tool & material selection
